message:
Extract build_suite_json_summary and include artifact paths in JSON output

Refactor the inline JSON summary construction into a dedicated
build_suite_json_summary() function and enrich the JSON output with
generated artifact paths (summary, manifest, report log/json/html).
Paths are conditionally included based on file existence. Adds a
test verifying artifact path inclusion and null handling for
non-existent files.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
